fields.transaction_id: Unique transaction ID. Format TXN-NNNNN or TXN-ECNNN for edge cases.
fields.user_name: Synthetic persona full name. Not a real person.
fields.date: ISO 8601 date of transaction (YYYY-MM-DD). Edge case TXN-EC005 has future date.
fields.category: Top-level spending/income category. One of 18 values.
fields.subcategory: Spending classification: Essential, Discretionary, Recurring, One-off, Income. May be null (edge case).
fields.amount: Transaction amount in original_currency. May be 0.0 for reversals.
fields.currency: 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code: USD, EUR, GBP, INR, SGD.
fields.account_type: Account bucket: Checking, Savings, Credit Card, Investment Brokerage, Emergency Fund.
fields.balance_after: Account balance after transaction. May be negative (overdraft edge case).
fields.is_recurring: Boolean. True if this is a known recurring charge/income.
fields.budget_limit: Monthly budget cap set for this category in USD. Null if no budget set.
fields.budget_pct_used: amount / budget_limit * 100. Null if budget_limit is null. >100 = over budget.
fields.tags: Snake_case tag derived from category for filtering/grouping.
fields.note: Human-readable annotation. Edge case records carry 'EDGE: ...' notes.
fields.risk_flag: Boolean. True when budget_pct_used > 120 or anomaly_score > 0.85.
fields.anomaly_score: Float 0.0–1.0. Higher = more anomalous. Statistical outlier signal.
fields.fx_rate_to_usd: Exchange rate at time of transaction (1 original_currency = N USD).
fields.original_currency: Currency the transaction was denominated in.
fields.original_amount: Amount in original_currency before FX conversion.
